title: “You and your fake husband....": Candace Owens accuses Laura Loomer of lying about her marriage in explosive social media feud
summary_full: Laura Loomer and Candace Owens ignited a fierce online feud after Loomer accused Owens of using her Russia trip to prepare for possible asylum if investigated for alleged FARA violations. Loomer also speculated about Owens’ pregnancy. Owens fired back with a deeply personal response, accusing Loomer of lying about her relationship and mocking her Alaskan cruise photos. Their explosive exchange quickly went viral, drawing intense reactions across social media and further escalating tensions between the two controversial conservative personalities.
